reviews.review_description:
its a pretty good game but it just need like more improvement, if that's fine? But hey you do you developers keep up the good work. 👍

oh and also for axels review just because jack was being mean or something like that, that doesn't mean you can just leave a 1 review for the game. What did the game do?

developer_response.body: fr thank you, he was just trying to frame jackz, but thank you for bring honest about the game, me and the other devs are working it make this better.

reviews.review_description:
so basically me and a couple other of my friends were close friends with jack. But one day he thought it would be a good idea to fake selling his acc on discord and just start saying the n word. After he threatened to call me and the rest of my friends MORE racial slurs. Later he blocked all of us, after giving me proof that he did NOT sell his acc. But later after this, he said “Gay=Bad” I just think that this is despicable behavior and that he should be punished for his actions

If your don’t believe me, if you have discord I can send you proof.

developer_response.body:
just cuz jackx dont like you dont meant u give us 1 star
and stop lying!

reviews.review_description: I like the game because of everything there is and how it’s funny when the bots come after us🥳🥳
It’s a good game but just needs a little bit more work on and I want the worker to stop asking questions

developer_response.body: Yes I know, the workers just ask me alot , im sorry. i made this in 20 days
